items.name: Mistform
items.effect: Once each round, you may negate one attack against you.

items.name: Nullward
items.effect: Once each round, you may negate one spell that targets you.

items.name: Driftstep
items.effect: When an attack hits you, you may immediately move one space.

items.name: Phantomfield
items.effect: You may move through enemies, allies, and obstacles. You may not end your movement inside one.

items.name: Treadlight
items.effect: You ignore the movement and damage payloads of Pales you stand in or move through.

items.name: Shadowmeld
items.effect: If you dealt no damage during the previous round, you gain Shrouded, the concealment Effect.

items.name: Echosight
items.effect: You can see through darkness and concealment, and you cannot be hidden from or ambushed.

items.name: Afterimage
items.effect: If you moved during the previous round, your first Evasion roll this round is a Lucky Roll.

items.name: Deathsong
items.effect: After you take damage, your next Evasion roll is a Lucky Roll.

items.name: Oakspine
items.effect: You cannot be forcibly moved from your space.

items.name: Threshold
items.effect: No single hit can reduce your Vitality by more than half your maximum Vitality.

items.name: Emberhold
items.effect: The first time each combat a hit would reduce you to 0 Vitality, you remain at 1 instead.

items.name: Mendseam
items.effect: If you took no damage during the previous round, recover Vitality equal to your Vigor at the start of this round.

items.name: Scarweave
items.effect: At the start of each round, gain Temporary Vitality equal to your Vigor. It does not stack with itself.

items.name: Runeguard
items.effect: Once each round, when an ally within your Mobility range is hit, reduce the damage they take by your highest defensive attribute.

items.name: Bulwark
items.effect: Once each round, when an adjacent ally is targeted by an attack, you may make yourself the target instead.

items.name: Unbowed
items.effect: Treat your Fatigue as one rank lower than it is.

items.name: Lastlight
items.effect: While below half your maximum Vitality, the first attack against you each round misses.

items.name: Ironroot
items.effect: Spells and abilities may target you, but they may not target the space you occupy.

items.name: Hexward
items.effect: The first Affliction applied to you each round is prevented.
